pkgmetadata.longdescription: Microsoft Hyper-V Linux guest userspace daemons: hv_kvp_daemon (Key/Value Pair exchange), hv_vss_daemon (Volume Shadow Copy), and the file-copy daemon (hv_fcopy_daemon on Linux <6.10, hv_fcopy_uio_daemon on >=6.10). Built directly from tools/hv/ in the already-installed kernel source tree (via virtual/linux-sources), so no kernel tarball needs to be downloaded.
